channel.title: copyright troll on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in copyright troll on Have an average day :|

item.title: Judge orders failed copyright troll to forfeit "all" copyrights
item.description: Judge orders failed copyright troll to forfeit “all” copyrights. I’m all for protecting someone’s work. However when you have copyright trolls like Righthaven it brings to light two problems. One, we need to reform our copyright/patent system. Two, companies like Righthaven need to be punished. I’m pretty happy with this ruling.
